```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# Correct the overall evaluated sites for same methodology as before, no Ig or
# sex chromosomes
snv_fish_final <- snv_fish[gr.in(query = snv_fish, subject = eligible_bed)]
snv_fish_ig <- snv_fish[gr.in(query = snv_fish, subject = ig_region_mask_bed)]

complete_snv_fish_per_sample <- left_join(x = gr2dt(gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_in_hq_patients %Q%
    (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV"), subject = snv_fish_final, qcol = c("Reference_Allele",
    "Tumor_Seq_Allele2", "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode"))) %>%
    dplyr::rename(sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode),
    y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
            coverage_normal, coverage_tumor, purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id),
    by = c("patient", "sample")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(6, 7)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

indel_fish_final <- indel_fish[gr.in(query = indel_fish, subject = eligible_bed)]
indel_fish_ig <- indel_fish[gr.in(query = indel_fish, subject = ig_region_mask_bed)]

complete_indel_fish_per_sample <- left_join(x = gr2dt(gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_in_hq_patients %Q%
    (VARIANT_CLASS %in% c("insertion", "deletion")), subject = indel_fish_final,
    qcol = c("Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2", "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode"))) %>%
    dplyr::rename(sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode),
    y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
            coverage_normal, coverage_tumor, purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id),
    by = c("patient", "sample")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(6, 7)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

message("Total unique SNVs and InDels after filtering out silent mutations ...")
## Total unique SNVs and InDels after filtering out silent mutations ...
message("Unique SNVs: ", length(snv_fish_final))
## Unique SNVs: 1053256
message("InDels: ", length(indel_fish_final))
## InDels: 72176
message("This is set of mutations used in fishHook model.")
## This is set of mutations used in fishHook model.

complete_snv_fish_metrics <- complete_snv_fish_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
    dplyr::count(name = "total_snvs") %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_snvs_per_sample = median(total_snvs), range_snvs = range(total_snvs))
message("median SNVs per sample: ", complete_snv_fish_metrics$median_snvs_per_sample[1])
## median SNVs per sample: 3304
message("range of SNVs per sample: ", complete_snv_fish_metrics$range_snvs[1], " to ",
    complete_snv_fish_metrics$range_snvs[2])
## range of SNVs per sample: 13 to 13095

complete_indel_fish_metrics <- complete_indel_fish_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
    dplyr::count(name = "total_indels") %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_indels_per_sample = median(total_indels), range_indels = range(total_indels))
message("median InDels per sample: ", complete_indel_fish_metrics$median_indels_per_sample[1])
## median InDels per sample: 216
message("range of InDels per sample: ", complete_indel_fish_metrics$range_indels[1],
    " to ", complete_indel_fish_metrics$range_indels[2])
## range of InDels per sample: 8 to 1143

tmb_fish_eligbile <- rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(age)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation, coverage_normal,
        coverage_tumor, purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::count(name = "total_mutation_count") %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::filter(total_mutation_count > 1000) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tumor_mutation_burden = total_mutation_count/(sum(GenomicRanges::width(eligible_bed))/1000000))
tmb_fish_eligbile$age <- as.numeric(tmb_fish_eligbile$age)

# Correct the TMB by age by fitting a linear model
message("Testing linear regression of TMB in high-confidence genome and demographic / molecular covariates")
## Testing linear regression of TMB in high-confidence genome and demographic / molecular covariates
test_tmb_lm <- lm(data = tmb_fish_eligbile, formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ age +
    igh_translocation + purity + ploidy)
summary(test_tmb_lm)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ age + igh_translocation + 
##     purity + ploidy, data = tmb_fish_eligbile)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.2191 -0.6251 -0.2178  0.4379  6.0832 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                Estimate Std. Error t value   Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                   -0.195010   0.606929  -0.321   0.748199    
## age                            0.010861   0.005913   1.837   0.067227 .  
## igh_translocationt(4;14)       0.691811   0.199557   3.467   0.000602 ***
## igh_translocationt(14;16)      0.811776   0.604795   1.342   0.180519    
## igh_translocationt(14;20)      0.255997   0.346914   0.738   0.461125    
## igh_translocationt(6;14)      -0.462020   0.474720  -0.973   0.331202    
## igh_translocationt(8;14)       0.518958   0.413404   1.255   0.210321    
## igh_translocationNot Detected  0.245714   0.154080   1.595   0.111811    
## purity                         1.162476   0.254253   4.572 0.00000703 ***
## ploidy                         0.345574   0.211603   1.633   0.103475    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.023 on 305 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.137,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.1115 
## F-statistic:  5.38 on 9 and 305 DF,  p-value: 0.0000007633

# tmb_lm <- lm(data = tmb_fish_eligbile %>% dplyr::mutate('t4_14' =
# case_when(igh_translocation == 't(4;14)' ~ 1, igh_translocation != 't(4;14)'
# ~ 0), 'male' = case_when(sex == 'Male' ~ 1, sex != 'Male' ~ 0)), formula =
# tumor_mutation_burden ~ male + t4_14 + purity + ploidy)
message("Final linear regression model of TMB across disease stages")
## Final linear regression model of TMB across disease stages
tmb_lm <- lm(data = tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
    dplyr::mutate(t4_14 = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(4;14)" ~ 1, igh_translocation !=
        "t(4;14)" ~ 0)), formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ t4_14 + purity + ploidy)
summary(tmb_lm)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = tumor_mutation_burden ~ t4_14 + purity + ploidy, 
##     data = tmb_fish_eligbile %>% dplyr::mutate(t4_14 = case_when(igh_translocation == 
##         "t(4;14)" ~ 1, igh_translocation != "t(4;14)" ~ 0)))
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -2.3954 -0.6885 -0.1769  0.4359  5.9443 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value   Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)   0.3187     0.4817   0.661    0.50880    
## t4_14         0.4787     0.1688   2.836    0.00486 ** 
## purity        1.1765     0.2517   4.675 0.00000439 ***
## ploidy        0.4851     0.1919   2.528    0.01198 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 1.027 on 311 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.112,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.1034 
## F-statistic: 13.08 on 3 and 311 DF,  p-value: 0.00000004598


# Calculate age-adjusted TMB using the residuals of the linear fitting
tmb_fish_eligbile$tumor_mutation_burden_corrected <- resid(tmb_lm) + mean(tmb_fish_eligbile$tumor_mutation_burden)

# ggplot(tmb_fish_eligbile, aes(x = age)) + geom_point(aes(y =
# tumor_mutation_burden, color = 'Raw TMB')) + geom_point(aes(y =
# tumor_mutation_burden_corrected, color = 'Corrected TMB'), shape = 16, alpha
# = 0.7) + scale_color_manual(values = c('Raw TMB' = 'blue', 'Corrected TMB' =
# 'red'))

message("Median TMB across all patients: ", median(tmb_fish_eligbile$tumor_mutation_burden_corrected,
    na.rm = T))
## Median TMB across all patients: 2.15861084543219

# Plot the overall TMB by disease stage
dx_median_tmb <- tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
    dplyr::group_by(disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_tmb = median(na.omit(tumor_mutation_burden_corrected)),
        median_age = median(na.omit(age)))

dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = droplevels(tmb_fish_eligbile %>%
    dplyr::select(disease_stage, tumor_mutation_burden_corrected)), formula = tumor_mutation_burden_corrected ~
    disease_stage, p.adjust.method = "fdr")
dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p.adj)

tmb_by_dx <- ggplot(data = tmb_fish_eligbile, aes(x = disease_stage, y = tumor_mutation_burden)) +
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5), xmax = c(1.5,
        2.5, 3.5, 4.5), ymin = 0.1, ymax = 100, alpha = 0.25, fill = disease_stage_colors) +
    ggbeeswarm::geom_beeswarm(method = "compactswarm", corral = "wrap") + labs(y = "TMB (muts. per Mb)",
    x = NULL) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_y_log10(labels = c("0.1",
    "1.0", "10", "100"), breaks = c(0.1, 1, 10, 100), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45,
    hjust = 0.95, family = "sans", size = 14), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_text(family = "sans",
    size = 12), axis.title.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 15), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray75"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment", x = c(0.75, 1.75, 2.75, 3.75), xend = c(1.25,
        2.25, 3.25, 4.25), y = dx_median_tmb$median_tmb, yend = dx_median_tmb$median_tmb,
        color = "purple2", linewidth = 2.25) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "text", x = c(1,
    2, 3, 4), y = 150, label = as.character(round(dx_median_tmb$median_tmb, digits = 2)),
    size = 4.5) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output[c(4:6),
    ], label = "P={p_string}", y.position = c(1.28, 1.47, 1.69), tip.length = 0.008,
    label.size = 3.75, vjust = 0.1) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = dx_median_tmb_wilcox_output[c(1,
    2), ], label = "{p.adj.signif}", y.position = c(0.8, 1.06), tip.length = 0.008,
    label.size = 3.75, vjust = 0.1)

# Convert to simpler representation for mutation type, and take top consequence
# for each mutation if >1 given coding (in exon) vs non-conding (not in exon as
# by ensembl)
fish_muts_hq <- gr2dt(grbind(snv_fish_final, indel_fish_final)) %>%
    dplyr::rename(patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode, sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata, by = c("patient", "sample"))

fish_muts_hq <- fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::mutate(mut_type = case_when(Variant_Type == "SNP" ~ "SNVs", Variant_Type %in%
        c("INS", "DEL") ~ "InDels"), csq = stringr::str_replace_all(string = str_split(string = fish_muts_hq$Consequence,
        pattern = ",", simplify = T)[, 1], pattern = "_", replacement = " ")) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(impact = case_when(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant", "splice donor variant",
        "stop gained", "frameshift variant", "stop lost", "start lost") ~ "High",
        csq %in% c("inframe insertion", "inframe deletion", "missense variant", "protein altering variant") ~
            "Moderate", csq == "splice region variant" ~ "Low", csq %in% c("coding sequence variant",
            "mature miRNA variant", "5 prime UTR variant", "3 prime UTR variant",
            "non coding transcript exon variant", "intron variant", "upstream gene variant",
            "downstream gene variant", "TF binding site variant", "regulatory region variant",
            "intergenic variant") ~ "Modifier"), c_vs_nc = case_when(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant",
        "splice donor variant", "protein altering variant", "splice region variant",
        "mature miRNA variant", "5 prime UTR variant", "3 prime UTR variant", "non coding transcript exon variant",
        "intron variant", "upstream gene variant", "downstream gene variant", "TF binding site variant",
        "regulatory region variant", "intergenic variant") ~ "Non-coding", csq %in%
        c("stop gained", "frameshift variant", "stop lost", "start lost", "inframe insertion",
            "inframe deletion", "missense variant", "coding sequence variant") ~
        "Coding"))

fish_muts_hq$age <- as.numeric(fish_muts_hq$age)

# reorder csq from hig to low
fish_muts_hq$csq <- factor(fish_muts_hq$csq, levels = c("splice acceptor variant",
    "splice donor variant", "stop gained", "frameshift variant", "stop lost", "start lost",
    "inframe insertion", "inframe deletion", "missense variant", "protein altering variant",
    "splice region variant", "coding sequence variant", "mature miRNA variant", "5 prime UTR variant",
    "3 prime UTR variant", "non coding transcript exon variant", "intron variant",
    "upstream gene variant", "downstream gene variant", "TF binding site variant",
    "regulatory region variant", "intergenic variant"))

# reorder impact
fish_muts_hq$impact <- factor(fish_muts_hq$impact, levels = c("High", "Moderate",
    "Low", "Modifier"))

# order coding vs non-coding
fish_muts_hq$c_vs_nc <- factor(fish_muts_hq$c_vs_nc, levels = c("Coding", "Non-coding"))

# Plot count per consequence
disease_stage_order <- c("MGUS", "SMM", "MM", "RRMM")

# SNVs and InDels together
csq_plot_list <- list()
impact_plot_list <- list()
for (i in 1:length(disease_stage_order)) {
    csq_plt <- ggplot(data = fish_muts_hq %>%
        dplyr::group_by(csq, .drop = F) %>%
        dplyr::filter(disease_stage == disease_stage_order[i]) %>%
        dplyr::count(.drop = FALSE)) + ggplot2::geom_col(aes(x = csq, y = n, fill = csq)) +
        ggfittext::geom_bar_text(aes(x = csq, y = n, label = n), contrast = T) +
        labs(title = disease_stage_order[i], y = NULL) + scale_y_continuous(transform = "log1p",
        labels = scales::label_comma(accuracy = 1), breaks = c(1000, 10000, 100000,
            1000000)) + scale_x_discrete(breaks = c("splice acceptor variant", "splice donor variant",
        "stop gained", "frameshift variant", "stop lost", "start lost", "inframe insertion",
        "inframe deletion", "missense variant", "protein altering variant", "splice region variant",
        "coding sequence variant", "mature miRNA variant", "5 prime UTR variant",
        "3 prime UTR variant", "non coding transcript exon variant", "intron variant",
        "upstream gene variant", "downstream gene variant", "TF binding site variant",
        "regulatory region variant", "intergenic variant")) + scale_fill_manual(name = "Consequence",
        values = c(rev(paletteer_c("ggthemes::Purple", 8)[3:8]), rev(paletteer_c("ggthemes::Brown",
            6)[3:6]), "#317197", rev(paletteer_c("ggthemes::Classic Area Green",
            14)[4:14]))) + theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(size = 13))
    # Add the bar plot
    csq_plot_list <- rlist::list.append(csq_plot_list, csq_plt)

    # now add the pie chart
    impact_pie <- ggpie::ggpie(data = fish_muts_hq %>%
        dplyr::filter(disease_stage == disease_stage_order[i]), group_key = "impact",
        count_type = "full", label_info = c("count", "ratio"), label_type = "horizon",
        label_size = 6, label_pos = "out", label_threshold = 50, label_color = c("#613C5F",
            "#752825", "#295f80", "#357300")) + scale_fill_manual(name = "Impact\nGroup",
        values = c("#613C5F", "#752825", "#295f80", "#357300")) + labs(title = disease_stage_order[i]) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16))
    # Add the bar plot
    impact_plot_list <- rlist::list.append(impact_plot_list, impact_pie)

}
```

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
complete_gene_segments_gr <- readRDS(file = paste0(base_data_path, "completeGeneSegments.rds"))

# Set the region TMB denominator
cds_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (coding_v_noncoding == "coding" & gene_biotype ==
    "protein_coding")
cds_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(cds_regions[gr.in(query = cds_regions,
    subject = eligible_bed)]))/1000000

five_prime_utr_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (segment == "five_prime_utr" &
    gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
five_prime_utr_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(five_prime_utr_regions[gr.in(query = five_prime_utr_regions,
    subject = eligible_bed)]))/1000000

three_prime_utr_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (segment == "three_prime_utr" &
    gene_biotype == "protein_coding")
three_prime_utr_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(three_prime_utr_regions[gr.in(query = three_prime_utr_regions,
    subject = eligible_bed)]))/1000000

intron_regions <- complete_gene_segments_gr %Q% (segment == "intron" & gene_biotype ==
    "protein_coding")
intron_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(intron_regions[gr.in(query = intron_regions,
    subject = eligible_bed)]))/1000000

intergenic_regions <- eligible_bed %_% complete_gene_segments_gr
intergenic_tmb_denom <- sum(GenomicRanges::width(intergenic_regions))/1000000


# With the regions of interest set, now calculate the TMB for each
cds_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
        dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, sample,
            patient), by = c("seqnames", "start", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
        "sample", "patient")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
        purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::filter(c_vs_nc == "Coding") %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tmb = n/cds_tmb_denom, genomic_context = "CDS")

five_prime_utr_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
        dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, sample,
            patient), by = c("seqnames", "start", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
        "sample", "patient")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
        purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::filter(csq == "5 prime UTR variant") %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tmb = n/five_prime_utr_tmb_denom, genomic_context = "5' UTR")

three_prime_utr_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
        dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, sample,
            patient), by = c("seqnames", "start", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
        "sample", "patient")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
        purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::filter(csq == "3 prime UTR variant") %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tmb = n/three_prime_utr_tmb_denom, genomic_context = "3' UTR")

intron_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
        dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, sample,
            patient), by = c("seqnames", "start", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
        "sample", "patient")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
        purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("splice acceptor variant", "splice donor variant", "splice region variant",
        "intron variant")) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tmb = n/intron_tmb_denom, genomic_context = "Intron")

intergenic_tmb <- fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(y = rrbind(complete_snv_fish_per_sample, complete_indel_fish_per_sample) %>%
        dplyr::select(seqnames, start, Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2, sample,
            patient), by = c("seqnames", "start", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
        "sample", "patient")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
        purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::filter(csq %in% c("upstream gene variant", "downstream gene variant",
        "TF binding site variant", "regulatory region variant", "intergenic variant")) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%

    dplyr::mutate(tmb = n/intergenic_tmb_denom, genomic_context = "Intergenic")

# Plot the TMB per sequence classification
genomic_context_tmb <- rrbind(cds_tmb, five_prime_utr_tmb, three_prime_utr_tmb, intron_tmb,
    intergenic_tmb) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(sex) & !is.na(age) & !is.na(igh_translocation) & !is.na(purity) &
        !is.na(ploidy))

# Correct the TMB by age by fitting a linear model
message("Testing linear regression of TMB and demographic / molecular covariates")
## Testing linear regression of TMB and demographic / molecular covariates
test_genomic_lm <- lm(data = genomic_context_tmb, formula = tmb ~ age + igh_translocation +
    purity + ploidy)
summary(test_genomic_lm)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = tmb ~ age + igh_translocation + purity + ploidy, 
##     data = genomic_context_tmb)
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -1.8541 -0.6577 -0.1394  0.4694  6.8726 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                                Estimate Std. Error t value    Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                    0.389967   0.233376   1.671    0.094915 .  
## age                            0.007840   0.002327   3.369    0.000771 ***
## igh_translocationt(4;14)       0.177713   0.078599   2.261    0.023889 *  
## igh_translocationt(14;16)      1.116136   0.243823   4.578 0.000005055 ***
## igh_translocationt(14;20)      0.195324   0.134193   1.456    0.145710    
## igh_translocationt(6;14)      -0.007424   0.191286  -0.039    0.969047    
## igh_translocationt(8;14)       0.291453   0.165601   1.760    0.078599 .  
## igh_translocationNot Detected  0.162578   0.059206   2.746    0.006099 ** 
## purity                         0.526741   0.099092   5.316 0.000000121 ***
## ploidy                        -0.019297   0.077471  -0.249    0.803323    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.9224 on 1647 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.03714,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.03188 
## F-statistic: 7.058 on 9 and 1647 DF,  p-value: 0.0000000004482

# Looks to be over fit with all this, will remove 'male' as the sex chromosomes
# are already removed
message("Final linear regression model of TMB across genomic regions")
## Final linear regression model of TMB across genomic regions
genomic_tmb_lm <- lm(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::mutate(t14_16 = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(14;16)" ~ 1, igh_translocation !=
        "t(14;16)" ~ 0)), formula = tmb ~ age + t14_16 + purity)
# genomic_tmb_lm <- lm(data = genomic_context_tmb %>% dplyr::mutate('t14_16' =
# case_when(igh_translocation == 't(14;16)' ~ 1, igh_translocation !=
# 't(14;16)' ~ 0), 'male' = case_when(sex == 'Male' ~ 1, sex != 'Male' ~ 0)),
# formula = tmb ~ male + age + t14_16 + purity)
summary(genomic_tmb_lm)
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = tmb ~ age + t14_16 + purity, data = genomic_context_tmb %>% 
##     dplyr::mutate(t14_16 = case_when(igh_translocation == "t(14;16)" ~ 
##         1, igh_translocation != "t(14;16)" ~ 0)))
## 
## Residuals:
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -1.8493 -0.6594 -0.1530  0.4758  6.8921 
## 
## Coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value   Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept) 0.535113   0.155384   3.444   0.000588 ***
## age         0.007001   0.002305   3.038   0.002421 ** 
## t14_16      0.985308   0.240207   4.102 0.00004297 ***
## purity      0.512740   0.096969   5.288 0.00000014 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.9237 on 1653 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.03088,	Adjusted R-squared:  0.02912 
## F-statistic: 17.56 on 3 and 1653 DF,  p-value: 0.00000000003206

# Calculate age-adjusted TMB using the residuals of the linear fitting
genomic_context_tmb$tmb_corrected <- resid(genomic_tmb_lm) + mean(genomic_context_tmb$tmb)

genomic_context_median_tmb <- genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(tmb_corrected > 0) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(genomic_context) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_tmb = median(na.omit(tmb_corrected)))

genomic_context_tmb$genomic_context <- factor(genomic_context_tmb$genomic_context,
    levels = c("CDS", "3' UTR", "Intron", "5' UTR", "Intergenic"))

genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb,
    formula = tmb_corrected ~ genomic_context)
genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output$p.adj)

tmb_by_genomic_region <- ggplot(genomic_context_tmb, aes(x = genomic_context, y = tmb_corrected)) +
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5), xmax = c(1.5,
        2.5, 3.5, 4.5, 5.5), ymin = 0.01, ymax = 100, alpha = 0.25, fill = paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[1:5]) +
    ggbeeswarm::geom_beeswarm(method = "compactswarm", corral = "wrap") + labs(y = "TMB (muts. per Mb)",
    x = NULL) + scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) + scale_y_log10(labels = c("0.01",
    "0.1", "1.0", "10", "100"), breaks = c(0.01, 0.1, 1, 10, 100), expand = c(0.03,
    0.03)) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, family = "sans",
    size = 14), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_text(family = "sans",
    size = 12), axis.title.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 15), panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "gray75"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA)) +
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment", x = c(0.65, 1.65, 2.65, 3.65, 4.65), xend = c(1.35,
        2.35, 3.35, 4.35, 5.35), y = genomic_context_median_tmb$median_tmb[c(3, 1,
        5, 2, 4)], yend = genomic_context_median_tmb$median_tmb[c(3, 1, 5, 2, 4)],
        color = "green", linewidth = 2.25) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "text", x = c(1,
    2, 3, 4, 5), y = 150, label = as.character(round(genomic_context_median_tmb$median_tmb[c(3,
    1, 5, 2, 4)], digits = 2)), size = 4.5) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output[1,
    ], label = "P={p.adj}", y.position = 0.84, tip.length = 0.008, label.size = 3.75,
    vjust = 0.1) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = genomic_context_tmb_wilcox_output[c(2:4),
    ], label = "P={p_string}", y.position = c(1.13, 1.4, 1.64), tip.length = 0.008,
    label.size = 3.75, vjust = 0.1)

# SPLiT BY DISEASE STAGE
genomic_context_median_tmb_by_dx <- genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(tmb_corrected > 0) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(genomic_context, disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_tmb = median(na.omit(tmb_corrected)))

cds_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "CDS") %>%
    droplevels(), formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

three_prime_utr_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "3' UTR") %>%
    droplevels(), formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

five_prime_utr_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "5' UTR") %>%
    droplevels(), formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

intron_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "Intron") %>%
    droplevels(), formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

intergenic_tmb_by_dx_wilcox <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = genomic_context_tmb %>%
    dplyr::filter(genomic_context == "Intergenic") %>%
    droplevels(), formula = tmb_corrected ~ disease_stage)

# regional_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p_string <-
# scientific(regional_median_tmb_wilcox_output$p.adj)

tmb_by_genomic_context_by_dx <- ggplot(genomic_context_tmb, aes(x = genomic_context,
    y = tmb_corrected, colour = disease_stage)) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
    xmin = c(0.5, 1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5), xmax = c(1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5, 5.5), ymin = 0.01,
    ymax = 10, alpha = 0.25, fill = paletteer_d("ggsci::hallmarks_light_cosmic")[1:5]) +
    geom_boxplot() + labs(y = "Tumor mutational burden (muts. per Mb)", x = NULL) +
    scale_y_log10(labels = c("0.01", "0.1", "1.0", "10"), breaks = c(0.01, 0.1, 1,
```

Now look at results of Pan-Myeloma fishHook model

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# Looking at fishHook model output Analysis of model output
snv_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/panMyeloma/mgp1000_snv_results.sushi.rds"))
indel_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/panMyeloma/mgp1000_indel_results.sushi.rds"))

# Visualize in a genome-wide fashion like GWAS for tiles
snv_sushi_results$mut_type <- "SNV"
indel_sushi_results$mut_type <- "InDel"

sushi_combo <- gr_refactor_seqs(grbind(dt2gr(snv_sushi_results), dt2gr(indel_sushi_results)))
sushi_for_plot <- gr_absolute_ranges(input_gr = sushi_combo, cpus = 2)
## Setting parallel cores to 2 ...

sushi_for_plot$mut_type <- factor(sushi_for_plot$mut_type, levels = c("SNV", "InDel"))

# sushi_for_plot$true_gene <- complete_gene_segments_gr$gene_name[nearest(x =
# sushi_for_plot, subject = gUtils::gr.stripstrand(complete_gene_segments_gr))]

# After manual inspection of nearest protein coding genes and expanded
# overlapping genes we updated the assignment of genes for the following MERs
# TSPOAP1 ====> MIR142 CSDE1 ====> NRAS BLOC1S5-TXNDC5.  ====> TXNDC5 FRMD8
# ====> NEAT1

# QQ plots SNVs First grab disease specific set and order by most FDR
# significance
panmy_snv_fishhook <- gr2dt(sushi_for_plot) %>%
    dplyr::filter(mut_type == "SNV") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(fdr) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(true_gene_label = case_when(nearest_gene == "TSPOAP1" ~ "MIR142",
        nearest_gene == "CSDE1" ~ "NRAS", nearest_gene == "BLOC1S5-TXNDC5" ~ "TXNDC5",
        nearest_gene == "FRMD8" ~ "NEAT1", .default = nearest_gene))

# Top 10 genes
panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes <- panmy_snv_fishhook %>%
    dplyr::filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
    dplyr::distinct() %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
    purrr::as_vector() %>%
    as.character()

# Get index of all tiles per top gene
panmy_snv_top_gene_idx <- which(c(panmy_snv_fishhook %>%
    dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
    purrr::as_vector() %>%
    as.character()) %in% panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes)

# Build the color vector for each dot, highlight labels of interest and black
# for the rest
panmy_snv_color_idx <- data.table(idx = seq(1, nrow(panmy_snv_fishhook))) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(color_idx = case_when(idx %in% panmy_snv_top_gene_idx ~ "cyan",
        !idx %in% panmy_snv_top_gene_idx ~ "black"))

# Get the gene labels, only 1 for each set of top tiles
panmy_snv_gene_manhattan_labs <- panmy_snv_fishhook %>%
    dplyr::mutate(top_gene_idx = !duplicated(true_gene_label)) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(label = case_when(true_gene_label %in% panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes &
        top_gene_idx == T ~ true_gene_label, !true_gene_label %in% panmy_snv_top_fishhook_genes ~
        NA))

# fishHook QQ plot
panmy_snv_fish_qq <- geom_fishhook_qq(fishhook_results = panmy_snv_fishhook, plot_title = "Pan-Myeloma",
    hightlight_vector = panmy_snv_color_idx$color_idx, label_vector = panmy_snv_gene_manhattan_labs$label,
    manual_lambda = 1.09, label_x_nudge = 15)

# InDels
panmy_indel_fishhook <- gr2dt(sushi_for_plot) %>%
    dplyr::filter(mut_type == "InDel") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(fdr) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(true_gene_label = case_when(nearest_gene == "BLOC1S5-TXNDC5" ~
        "TXNDC5", nearest_gene == "BMP6" ~ "TXNDC5", .default = nearest_gene))

panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes <- panmy_indel_fishhook %>%
    dplyr::filter(fdr < 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
    dplyr::distinct() %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
    purrr::as_vector() %>%
    as.character()

panmy_indel_top_gene_idx <- which(c(panmy_indel_fishhook %>%
    dplyr::select(true_gene_label) %>%
    purrr::as_vector() %>%
    as.character()) %in% panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes)

panmy_indel_color_idx <- data.table(idx = seq(1, nrow(panmy_indel_fishhook))) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(color_idx = case_when(idx %in% panmy_indel_top_gene_idx ~ "cyan",
        !idx %in% panmy_indel_top_gene_idx ~ "black"))

panmy_indel_gene_manhattan_labs <- panmy_indel_fishhook %>%
    dplyr::mutate(top_gene_idx = !duplicated(true_gene_label)) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(label = case_when(true_gene_label %in% panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes &
        top_gene_idx == T ~ true_gene_label, !true_gene_label %in% panmy_indel_top_fishhook_genes ~
        NA))

# fishHook QQ plot
panmy_indel_fish_qq <- geom_fishhook_qq(fishhook_results = panmy_indel_fishhook,
    plot_title = "Pan-Myeloma", hightlight_vector = panmy_indel_color_idx$color_idx,
    label_vector = panmy_indel_gene_manhattan_labs$label, manual_lambda = 1.01, label_x_nudge = -2.5)

# Full genome view of SNV and InDel tiles
fishtiles <- ggplot(data = gr2dt(sushi_for_plot)) + scattermore::geom_scattermore(aes(x = start_abs_linear,
    y = -log10(fdr), color = mut_type), alpha = 0.5, pointsize = 3.5) + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05),
    linetype = "dashed", color = "darkred") + labs(y = expression("-log"[10] * "(" *
    italic("FDR") * ")")) + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, last(linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:22])),
    labels = names(hg_seqlengths()[1:22]), breaks = linearized_hg38_midpoint_breaks[1:22],
    expand = c(0.01, 0.01)) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(-log10(sushi_for_plot$fdr)) +
    7), expand = c(0.01, 0.01)) + scale_color_manual(name = "Mutation Type", values = c("#191970",
    "#EEA9B8")) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = c(1, linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:21]),
    xmax = linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:22], ymin = 0, ymax = max(-log10(sushi_for_plot$fdr)) +
        7, alpha = 0.18, fill = linearized_hg38_strip_fill[1:22]) + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 0.95), legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13), panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
```

Check tiles across disease stage specific models

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
dx_sushi_combo <- data.table()
for (i in 1:length(disease_stage_order)) {
    # Read in the disease specific results
    dx_snv_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/",
        disease_stage_order[i], "_snv_results.sushi.rds"))
    dx_indel_sushi_results <- readRDS(paste0(base_data_path, "fishHookModels/diseaseStageSpecific/",
        disease_stage_order[i], "_indel_results.sushi.rds"))

    # Add disease stage to DT
    dx_snv_sushi_results$disease_stage <- disease_stage_order[i]
    dx_indel_sushi_results$disease_stage <- disease_stage_order[i]

    # Add mutation type
    dx_snv_sushi_results$mut_type <- "SNV"
    dx_indel_sushi_results$mut_type <- "InDel"

    # Combine the data for plotting
    dx_sushi_combo <- gUtils::rrbind(dx_sushi_combo, dx_snv_sushi_results, dx_indel_sushi_results)
}

# Convert DT to GR
dx_sushi_combo_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(dx_sushi_combo))

# Add absolute range dx_sushi_for_plot <- gr_absolute_ranges(input_gr =
# dx_sushi_combo_gr, cpus = 2)
dx_sushi_for_plot <- gr2dt(dx_sushi_combo_gr)
dx_sushi_for_plot$disease_stage <- factor(dx_sushi_for_plot$disease_stage, levels = disease_stage_order)
dx_sushi_for_plot$mut_type <- factor(dx_sushi_for_plot$mut_type, levels = c("SNV",
    "InDel"))
```

## The landscape of the non-coding genome in myeloma is characterized by a discrete set of mutationally enriched regions, Part 2

Grab significant tiles and annotate by closest protein-coding / miRNA / lncRNA gene

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# To extract the list of genes targeted by the enrichment of non-coding
# mutations, first, subset to only tiles with FDR < 0.05 then sort by genomic
# coordinate
sig_snv_sushi <- snv_sushi_results[fdr < 0.05][order(seqnames, start)]
sig_indel_sushi <- indel_sushi_results[fdr < 0.05][order(seqnames, start)]

# How many final tiles
message("FDR Significant SNV enriched tiles: ", nrow(sig_snv_sushi))
## FDR Significant SNV enriched tiles: 4173
message("FDR Significant InDel enriched tiles: ", nrow(sig_indel_sushi))
## FDR Significant InDel enriched tiles: 275


# Create a set of stitched overlapping tiles to reduce to consensus segments
stitched_ncsnv_er <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.reduce(gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_snv_sushi)))[,
    c()])
stitched_ncsnv_er$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = stitched_ncsnv_er,
    subject = gUtils::gr.stripstrand(genes))]

stitched_ncindel_er <- gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::gr.reduce(gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_indel_sushi)))[,
    c()])
stitched_ncindel_er$nearest_gene <- genes$gene_name[nearest(x = stitched_ncindel_er,
    subject = gUtils::gr.stripstrand(genes))]
```
:::


Now work with set of stitched tiles to assign single combined P-value and gene
per set of stitched regions

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# Need to find all tiles that were collapsed into each stitched region then
# compute combined p-value for each stitched enriched region Need to make sure
# use exact overlap and calculate the mean

# Lets loop through each stitched mutation enriched region and grab number of
# tiles and combined p-value SNVs

ncsnv_fish_data_per_site <- data.table::data.table(k_tiles = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)),
    q_value = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)), effect_size_mean = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)),
    count_density_mean = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)), pred_count_density_mean = rep(NA,
        length(stitched_ncsnv_er)), eligible_size_mean = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)))

for (i in 1:length(stitched_ncsnv_er)) {
    tile_set_to_stitch <- gr.findoverlaps(subject = stitched_ncsnv_er[i, ], query = gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_snv_sushi)),
        type = "within", qcol = c("fdr", "effectsize", "count.density", "count.pred.density",
            "eligible"))

    # Calculate the mean FDR p-value, effect size, count density, predicted
    # count density and the eligible region
    new_qval <- poolr::bonferroni(p = tile_set_to_stitch$fdr)

    ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles[i] <- length(tile_set_to_stitch)
    ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$q_value[i] <- as.numeric(new_qval$p)
    ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$effectsize)
    ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.density)
    ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.pred.density)
    ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$eligible)
}

# Add the final metadata to the consensus sites
stitched_ncsnv_er$k_tiles <- ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles
stitched_ncsnv_er$q_value <- ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$q_value
stitched_ncsnv_er$effect_size_mean <- ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean
stitched_ncsnv_er$count_density_mean <- ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean
stitched_ncsnv_er$pred_count_density_mean <- ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean
stitched_ncsnv_er$eligible_size_mean <- ncsnv_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean

# snv_k_and_p_dt <- data.table::data.table(k_tiles = rep(NA,
# length(stitched_ncsnv_er)), p_combine = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)))
# for(i in 1:length(stitched_ncsnv_er)) { tile_set_to_stitch <-
# gr.findoverlaps(subject = stitched_ncsnv_er[i,], query =
# gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_snv_sushi)), type = 'within', qcol =
# 'fdr') # now calculate the combined p-value using the Bonferroni method on
# the tile FDR adjusted p-values new_combined_pval <- poolr::bonferroni(p =
# tile_set_to_stitch$fdr) snv_k_and_p_dt$k_tiles[i] <-
# length(tile_set_to_stitch) snv_k_and_p_dt$p_combine[i] <- new_combined_pval$p
# } stitched_ncsnv_er$k_tiles <- snv_k_and_p_dt$k_tiles
# stitched_ncsnv_er$p_combine <- snv_k_and_p_dt$p_combine
stitched_ncsnv_er$mut_uniq_id <- paste0("snv_er", seq(1, length(stitched_ncsnv_er)))

# InDels
ncindel_fish_data_per_site <- data.table::data.table(k_tiles = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncindel_er)),
    q_value = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncindel_er)), effect_size_mean = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncindel_er)),
    count_density_mean = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncindel_er)), pred_count_density_mean = rep(NA,
        length(stitched_ncindel_er)), eligible_size_mean = rep(NA, length(stitched_ncindel_er)))

for (i in 1:length(stitched_ncindel_er)) {
    tile_set_to_stitch <- gr.findoverlaps(subject = stitched_ncindel_er[i, ], query = gr_refactor_seqs(gUtils::dt2gr(sig_indel_sushi)),
        type = "within", qcol = c("fdr", "effectsize", "count.density", "count.pred.density",
            "eligible"))

    # Calculate the mean FDR p-value, effect size, count density, predicted
    # count density and the eligible region
    new_qval <- poolr::bonferroni(p = tile_set_to_stitch$fdr)

    ncindel_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles[i] <- length(tile_set_to_stitch)
    ncindel_fish_data_per_site$q_value[i] <- as.numeric(new_qval$p)
    ncindel_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$effectsize)
    ncindel_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.density)
    ncindel_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$count.pred.density)
    ncindel_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean[i] <- mean(tile_set_to_stitch$eligible)
}

# Add the final metadata to the consensus sites
stitched_ncindel_er$k_tiles <- ncindel_fish_data_per_site$k_tiles
stitched_ncindel_er$q_value <- ncindel_fish_data_per_site$q_value
stitched_ncindel_er$effect_size_mean <- ncindel_fish_data_per_site$effect_size_mean
stitched_ncindel_er$count_density_mean <- ncindel_fish_data_per_site$count_density_mean
stitched_ncindel_er$pred_count_density_mean <- ncindel_fish_data_per_site$pred_count_density_mean
stitched_ncindel_er$eligible_size_mean <- ncindel_fish_data_per_site$eligible_size_mean
```

Find all overlapping genes at each site

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# TODO: functionalize this annotation process loop through each range and
# output all genes that overlap each region
stitched_ncsnv_overlapping_genes <- data.table()
for (i in 1:length(stitched_ncsnv_er)) {
    per_mer_gene_overlap <- gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = stitched_ncsnv_er[i],
        subject = complete_gene_segments_gr, qcol = "mut_uniq_id", scol = "gene_name")
    # Only use the unique set of annotations
    uniq_gene_overlap <- unique(per_mer_gene_overlap$gene_name)
    # String the genes together for overlap column
    stitched_ncsnv_overlapping_genes <- gUtils::rrbind(stitched_ncsnv_overlapping_genes,
        data.table(mut_uniq_id = stitched_ncsnv_er$mut_uniq_id[i], overlapping_genes = stringr::str_c(uniq_gene_overlap,
            collapse = ";")))
}
stitched_ncsnv_er$overlapping_genes <- stitched_ncsnv_overlapping_genes$overlapping_genes

stitched_ncindel_overlapping_genes <- data.table()
for (i in 1:length(stitched_ncindel_er)) {
    per_mer_gene_overlap <- gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = stitched_ncindel_er[i],
        subject = complete_gene_segments_gr, qcol = "mut_uniq_id", scol = "gene_name")
    # Only use the unique set of annotations
    uniq_gene_overlap <- unique(per_mer_gene_overlap$gene_name)
    # String the genes together for overlap column
    stitched_ncindel_overlapping_genes <- gUtils::rrbind(stitched_ncindel_overlapping_genes,
        data.table(mut_uniq_id = stitched_ncindel_er$mut_uniq_id[i], overlapping_genes = stringr::str_c(uniq_gene_overlap,
            collapse = ";")))
}
stitched_ncindel_er$overlapping_genes <- stitched_ncindel_overlapping_genes$overlapping_genes
```

:::


Combine the set of SNV/InDel enriched regions into a set of Mutation Enriched Regions (MERs)

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# Combine the two sets of enriched retions
mers <- gr2dt(gr_refactor_seqs(grbind(stitched_ncsnv_er, stitched_ncindel_er)))

# Sort by combined p-value and filter and then uniquely label each MER by
# ranking and calculate percentage of all patients with mutation in MER
mers <- mers %>%
    dplyr::arrange(q_value) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pct_total_mut_patients = round(total_mut_patients/length(unique(snv_fish$Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode)),
        digits = 3) * 100, mer_id = paste0("mer", seq(1, nrow(mers))))

# Print some metrics on MERs
message("total MERs: ", nrow(mers))
## total MERs: 307
message("Total unique genes associated to MERs: ", length(unique(mers$nearest_gene)))
## Total unique genes associated to MERs: 220

# How much of genome do MERs cover (look at redundant SNV+InDel MERs)
reduced_mers <- GenomicRanges::reduce(x = gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(mers)))
message("total Genomic span of MERs in Mbp: ", sum(GenomicRanges::width(reduced_mers))/1000000)
## total Genomic span of MERs in Mbp: 5.379
message("Median span MERs in Kbp: ", median(mers$width)/1000)
## Median span MERs in Kbp: 15
message("Range span MERs in Kbp: ", range(mers$width)[1]/1000, " to ", range(mers$width)[2]/1000)
## Range span MERs in Kbp: 10 to 91

# SNV and InDel MER specifics
message("SNV enriched MERs: ", nrow(mers %>%
    dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(mut_uniq_id, pattern = "snv_"))))
## SNV enriched MERs: 280
message("InDel enriched MERs: ", nrow(mers %>%
    dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(mut_uniq_id, pattern = "indel_"))))
## InDel enriched MERs: 27

# After manual inspection of nearest protein coding genes and expanded
# overlapping genes we updated the assignment of genes for the following MERs
# MER12 - TSPOAP1 ====> MIR142 MER14 - CSDE1 ====> NRAS MER36 - BLOC1S5-TXNDC5
# ====> TXNDC5 MER37 - BLOC1S5-TXNDC5 ====> TXNDC5 MER83 - FRMD8 ====> NEAT1
mers$mer_gene_label <- replace(x = mers$nearest_gene, list = c(12, 14, 36, 37, 83),
    values = c("MIR142", "NRAS", "TXNDC5", "TXNDC5", "NEAT1"))

# Redundant MERs
redundant_mers <- gr_refactor_seqs(gr.findoverlaps(query = stitched_ncindel_er, subject = stitched_ncsnv_er,
    qcol = c("q_value", "mut_uniq_id")))
redundant_mers_dt <- gr2dt(redundant_mers)
redundant_mers_dt <- left_join(x = redundant_mers_dt, y = mers, by = "mut_uniq_id")

message("InDel MERs overlapping SNV MERs: ", nrow(redundant_mers_dt))
## InDel MERs overlapping SNV MERs: 5
message("Overlap at these genes: ", paste0(redundant_mers_dt$mer_gene_label, collapse = ", "))
## Overlap at these genes: TENT5C, OR2T2, BCL6, TXNDC5, PLD5P1


# Plot MERs across the genome using midpoint of each MER
mers_gr <- gr_refactor_seqs(dt2gr(mers))
mers_gr <- gr_absolute_ranges(mers_gr)
## Setting parallel cores to 1 ...

# TODO: add this functionality to gr_absolute_ranges
mer_abs_midpoints <- c()
for (i in 1:length(mers_gr)) {
    mer_abs_midpoints[i] <- elliplot::midpoint(c(mers_gr$start_abs_linear[i], mers_gr$end_abs_linear[i]))[[1]][2]
}
mers_gr$midpoint_abs_linear <- mer_abs_midpoints
mers_gr$mer_type <- case_when(stringr::str_detect(mers_gr$mut_uniq_id, pattern = "indel_") ~
    "InDel", stringr::str_detect(mers_gr$mut_uniq_id, pattern = "snv_") ~ "SNV")
mers <- gr2dt(mers_gr)
mers$mer_type <- factor(mers$mer_type, levels = c("SNV", "InDel"))

# Label some MERs of interest
mer_of_interest_labels <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "moiLabels.txt"), header = T)

mer_manhattan <- ggplot(data = mers) + ggplot2::geom_point(aes(x = midpoint_abs_linear,
    y = -log10(q_value), color = mer_type), alpha = 0.7, size = 4) + ggrepel::geom_text_repel(aes(x = midpoint_abs_linear,
    y = -log10(q_value), label = mer_of_interest_labels$gene_name), max.overlaps = 100,
    min.segment.length = 0) + ggplot2::labs(y = expression("-log"[10] * "(" * italic("q-value") *
    ")"), ) + ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1, last(linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:22])),
    labels = names(hg_seqlengths()[1:22]), breaks = linearized_hg38_midpoint_breaks[1:22],
    expand = c(0.01, 0.01)) + ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(-log10(mers$q_value)) +
    3), expand = c(0.01, 0.01)) + ggplot2::scale_color_manual(name = "MER Type",
    values = c("#FB832D", "black")) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = c(1,
    linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:21]), xmax = linearized_hg38_end_breaks[1:22], ymin = 0,
    ymax = max(-log10(mers$q_value)) + 3, alpha = 0.18, fill = linearized_hg38_strip_fill[1:22]) +
    ggplot2::theme(axis.title.y = element_text(family = "sans", size = 15), axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, size = 11), legend.position = "top",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13), panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
# export 6 x 11.69 landscape

# Write out final set of MERs
mer_cols <- c("seqnames", "start", "end", "width", "mer_id", "mer_gene_label", "mer_type",
    "k_tiles", "q_value", "effect_size_mean", "count_density_mean", "pred_count_density_mean",
    "eligible_size_mean", "total_mut_patients", "pct_total_mut_patients", "mut_mgus_patients",
    "pct_mut_mgus_patients", "mut_smm_patients", "pct_mut_smm_patients", "mut_mm_patients",
    "pct_mut_mm_patients", "mut_rrmm_patients", "pct_mut_rrmm_patients", "mut_t11_14_patients",
    "pct_mut_t11_14_patients", "mut_t4_14_patients", "pct_mut_t4_14_patients", "mut_t14_16_patients",
    "pct_mut_t14_16_patients", "mut_t14_20_patients", "pct_mut_t14_20_patients",
    "mut_t6_14_patients", "pct_mut_t6_14_patients", "mut_t8_14_patients", "pct_mut_t8_14_patients",
    "mut_trx_not_detected_patients", "pct_mut_trx_not_detected_patients", "mut_EUR_patients",
    "pct_mut_EUR_patients", "mut_AFR_patients", "pct_mut_AFR_patients", "mut_AMR_patients",
    "pct_mut_AMR_patients", "mut_EAS_patients", "pct_mut_EAS_patients", "mut_SAS_patients",
    "pct_mut_SAS_patients", "mut_highly_admixed_patients", "pct_mut_highly_admixed_patients",
    "nearest_gene", "overlapping_genes", "mut_uniq_id")

# dplyr::select(all_of(mer_cols)), file = 'MERs.txt', sep = '\t', row.names =
# F, col.names = T)
```

Look at the mutation burden across MERs by type and disease stage

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# Gather all SNVs in MERs per sample
complete_mer_snv_per_sample <- left_join(x = gr2dt(gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_in_hq_patients %Q%
    (VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV"), subject = mers_gr %Q% (mer_type == "SNV"), qcol = c("Reference_Allele",
    "Tumor_Seq_Allele2", "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode"),
    scol = c("mer_id", "mer_gene_label"))) %>%
    dplyr::rename(sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode),
    y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
            coverage_normal, coverage_tumor, purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id),
    by = c("patient", "sample")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(6, 7)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()
complete_mer_snv_per_sample$age <- as.numeric(complete_mer_snv_per_sample$age)

# Gather all InDels in MERs per sample
complete_mer_indel_per_sample <- left_join(x = gr2dt(gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_in_hq_patients %Q%
    (VARIANT_CLASS %in% c("insertion", "deletion")), subject = mers_gr %Q% (mer_type ==
    "InDel"), qcol = c("Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2", "Tumor_Sample_Barcode",
    "Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode"), scol = c("mer_id", "mer_gene_label"))) %>%
    dplyr::rename(sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode, patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode),
    y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(patient, sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation,
            coverage_normal, coverage_tumor, purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id),
    by = c("patient", "sample")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-c(6, 7)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()
complete_mer_indel_per_sample$age <- as.numeric(complete_mer_indel_per_sample$age)

# Calculate the broad mutational burden separate here SNVs #########
total_mer_snv_tmb <- complete_mer_snv_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(age)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage, age, sex, igh_translocation, coverage_normal,
        coverage_tumor, purity, ploidy, super5_cluster_id) %>%
    dplyr::count(name = "total_mutation_count") %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tumor_mutation_burden = total_mutation_count/(sum(GenomicRanges::width(mers_gr %Q%
        (mer_type == "SNV")))/1000000))
```

Check SNV MER metrics when split by translocation subtype

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
median_snv_per_mer_by_trx <- total_mer_snv_tmb %>%
  dplyr::group_by(igh_translocation) %>%
  dplyr::reframe("median_tmb_corrected" = median(na.omit(tmb_corrected)))

snv_per_mer_by_trx_wilcox_output <- total_mer_snv_tmb %>%
  dplyr::select(igh_translocation, tmb_corrected) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!igh_translocation %in% c("t(14;16)","t(6;14)","t(8;14)")) %>%
  droplevels() %>%
  rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(formula = tmb_corrected ~ igh_translocation,
                                p.adjust.method = "fdr")
snv_per_mer_by_trx_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(snv_per_mer_by_trx_wilcox_output$p.adj)

message("Median MER SNVs per t(11;14): ", median_snv_per_mer_by_trx[1,2])
## Median MER SNVs per t(11;14): 9.82784441369538
message("Median MER SNVs per t(4;14): ", median_snv_per_mer_by_trx[2,2])
## Median MER SNVs per t(4;14): 11.8718445954633
message("Median MER SNVs per t(14;20): ", median_snv_per_mer_by_trx[4,2])
## Median MER SNVs per t(14;20): 7.07311629921329

# SNVs in MERs by TRX

  ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect",
```

Check SNV MER metrics when split by disease stage

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# Disease Stage For accurate accounting of mutations per disease stage, need to
# allow for mutations to carry over from disease stage to another for
# multi-sample patients
muts_per_sample <- muts %Q% (Tumor_Sample_Barcode %in% unique(hq_dataset_metadata$sample)) %Q%
    (Variant_Classification != "Silent")

# get all SNV per sample in SNV MERs
ncsnv_per_sample <- gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_per_sample %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS ==
    "SNV"), subject = mers_gr %Q% (mer_type == "SNV"), qcol = c("Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode",
    "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "VARIANT_CLASS", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
    "VAF", "Variant_Classification"), scol = c("mer_gene_label", "mer_id", "mut_uniq_id"))
ncsnv_per_sample_dt <- gUtils::gr2dt(ncsnv_per_sample)

# Count per sample
ncsnv_per_sample_count <- ncsnv_per_sample_dt %>%
    dplyr::rename(patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode, sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

# Add metadata to DT
snv_per_mer_per_sample <- left_join(x = ncsnv_per_sample_count, y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage, age), by = "sample")

# group the counts by precursor and late disease
snv_per_mer_per_sample <- snv_per_mer_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::mutate(precursor_late = case_when(disease_stage %in% c("MGUS", "SMM") ~
        "Precursor", disease_stage %in% c("MM", "RR") ~ "Late"))
snv_per_mer_per_sample$precursor_late <- factor(snv_per_mer_per_sample$precursor_late,
    levels = c("Precursor", "Late"))

# Calculate the median for each group and run stats test
# median_snv_per_mer_by_precursor_late <- snv_per_mer_per_sample %>%
# dplyr::group_by(precursor_late) %>% dplyr::summarise(median_n =
# median(na.omit(n))) snv_per_mer_by_precursor_late_wilcox_output <-
# snv_per_mer_per_sample %>% dplyr::ungroup() %>% dplyr::select(precursor_late,
# n) %>% rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(formula = n ~ precursor_late,
# p.adjust.method = 'fdr') snv_per_mer_by_precursor_late_wilcox_output$p_string
# <- scientific(snv_per_mer_by_precursor_late_wilcox_output$p.adj)
# print('Median MER SNVs per Precursor samples:')
# median_snv_per_mer_by_precursor_late[2,2] print('Median MER SNVs per Late
# samples:') median_snv_per_mer_by_precursor_late[1,2]

median_snv_per_mer_by_dx <- snv_per_mer_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::group_by(disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_n = median(na.omit(n)))

median_snv_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output <- snv_per_mer_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::select(disease_stage, n) %>%
    droplevels() %>%
    rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(formula = n ~ disease_stage, p.adjust.method = "fdr")
median_snv_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(median_snv_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output$p.adj)


snvs_within_mers_by_dx_violin_plot <- ggplot(data = snv_per_mer_per_sample) + geom_violin(aes(x = disease_stage,
    y = n, fill = disease_stage), alpha = 0.6, color = "gray70") + geom_boxplot(aes(x = disease_stage,
    y = n, fill = disease_stage), outliers = FALSE, width = 0.15, color = "gray99",
    linewidth = 1.5) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 325)) + labs(y = "Total SNV count") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = disease_stage_colors) + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95,
        size = 14), legend.position = "none", panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent",
        linewidth = 1)) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = median_snv_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output[c(1,
    4:6), ], label = "P={p_string}", y.position = c(255, 285, 300, 315), tip.length = 0.005,
    label.size = 3.5, vjust = 0.1) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = median_snv_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output[2,
    ], label = "{p.adj.signif}", y.position = 270, tip.length = 0.005, label.size = 3.5,
    vjust = 0.1)
# export 5 x 5 portrait
```

Run similar analysis for InDels

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# For accurate accounting of mutations per disease stage, need to allow for
# mutations to carry over from disease stage to another for multi-sample
# patients
ncindel_per_sample <- gUtils::gr.findoverlaps(query = muts_per_sample %Q% (VARIANT_CLASS %in%
    c("insertion", "deletion")), subject = mers_gr %Q% (mer_type == "InDel"), , qcol = c("Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode",
    "Tumor_Sample_Barcode", "VARIANT_CLASS", "Reference_Allele", "Tumor_Seq_Allele2",
    "VAF", "Variant_Classification"), scol = c("nearest_gene", "mer_id", "mut_uniq_id"))
ncindel_per_sample_dt <- gUtils::gr2dt(ncindel_per_sample)

ncindel_per_sample_count <- ncindel_per_sample_dt %>%
    dplyr::rename(patient = Matched_Norm_Sample_Barcode, sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

indel_per_mer_per_sample <- left_join(x = ncindel_per_sample_count, y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage, age), by = "sample")

median_indel_per_mer_by_dx <- indel_per_mer_per_sample %>%
    dplyr::group_by(disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_n = median(na.omit(n)))

indel_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output <- droplevels(indel_per_mer_per_sample) %>%
    dplyr::select(disease_stage, n) %>%
    rstatix::wilcox_test(formula = n ~ disease_stage)
indel_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(indel_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output$p)


indel_within_mers_by_dx_violin_plot <- ggplot(data = indel_per_mer_per_sample) +
    geom_violin(aes(x = disease_stage, y = n, fill = disease_stage), alpha = 0.6) +
    labs(y = "Total InDel count") + scale_fill_manual(values = disease_stage_colors) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 8, 2)) + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, size = 14), legend.position = "none",
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent")) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "point",
    x = c(1, 2, 3, 4), y = median_indel_per_mer_by_dx$median_n, size = 4, shape = 21,
    color = "black", fill = "white") + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = indel_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output[c(4),
    ], label = "P={p_string}", y.position = 8, bracket.nudge.y = 0.5, size = 4.5,
    tip.length = 0.005) + ggpubr::stat_pvalue_manual(data = indel_per_mer_by_dx_wilcox_output[c(1,
    6), ], label = "{p.adj.signif}", y.position = c(7, 9), bracket.nudge.y = 0.5,
    size = 4.5, tip.length = 0.005)
# export 5 x 5 portrait

# Now correct for subtype, disease stage, and AA vs EA
indel_per_mer_by_trx <- muts_per_mer_for_plot %>%
    dplyr::filter(VARIANT_CLASS %in% c("insertion", "deletion") & igh_translocation !=
        "t(8;14)") %>%
    droplevels() %>%
    dplyr::group_by(patient, igh_translocation) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

median_indel_per_mer_by_trx <- indel_per_mer_by_trx %>%
    dplyr::group_by(igh_translocation) %>%
    dplyr::reframe(median_n = median(na.omit(n)))

indel_per_mer_by_trx_wilcox_output <- indel_per_mer_by_trx %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(igh_translocation, n) %>%
    rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(formula = n ~ igh_translocation, p.adjust.method = "fdr")

indel_per_mer_by_trx_plot <- ggplot(data = indel_per_mer_by_trx) + geom_violin(aes(x = igh_translocation,
    y = n, fill = igh_translocation)) + labs(y = "Total InDel count") + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,
    9), breaks = seq(0, 8, 2)) + scale_fill_manual(values = trx_colors) + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0.95, size = 14), legend.position = "none",
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent")) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "point",
    x = seq(1, 6, 1), y = median_indel_per_mer_by_trx$median_n, size = 3, shape = 21,
    color = "black", fill = "white")
```

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage, mer_id) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_count <- all_uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::count(name = "uniq_snv_mers") %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pct_mers_occupied = round((uniq_snv_mers/280 * 100), digits = 3))

# Order all records by % of SNV MERs occupied by sample per dx
uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered <- data.table()
for (i in 1:length(disease_stage_order)) {
    uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_count_per_dx <- uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_count %>%
        dplyr::filter(disease_stage == disease_stage_order[i])

    uniq_snv_mer_pct_order_per_dx <- uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_count_per_dx %>%
        dplyr::arrange(pct_mers_occupied) %>%
        dplyr::select(sample) %>%
        purrr::as_vector() %>%
        as.character()
    # Build ordered plot data
    uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered_per_dx <- uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_count_per_dx

    uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered_per_dx$sample <- factor(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered_per_dx$sample,
        levels = uniq_snv_mer_pct_order_per_dx)

    # Combine per disease stage ordered data to final set
    uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered <- rrbind(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered,
        uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered_per_dx)
}


# Calculate the medians
uniq_snv_mer_pct_occupied_median <- uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered %>%
    dplyr::group_by(disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(median_pct = median(pct_mers_occupied)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()


uniq_snv_mer_pct_occupied_wilcox_output <- rstatix::pairwise_wilcox_test(data = droplevels(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered),
    formula = pct_mers_occupied ~ disease_stage, p.adjust.method = "fdr") %>%
    rstatix::add_xy_position(x = "disease_stage")
uniq_snv_mer_pct_occupied_wilcox_output$p_string <- scientific(uniq_snv_mer_pct_occupied_wilcox_output$p.adj)

# TESTING
uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered <- uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered %>%
    group_by(disease_stage) %>%
    mutate(stage_median = median(pct_mers_occupied))

uniq_snv_mer_snake_plot <- ggpubr::ggdotchart(data = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered,
    x = "sample", y = "pct_mers_occupied", color = "disease_stage", palette = disease_stage_colors,
    dot.size = 2.5) + scale_y_continuous(trans = "log1p", breaks = c(0, 1, 10, 100)) +
    geom_hline(data = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_ordered %>%
        distinct(disease_stage, stage_median), aes(yintercept = stage_median, color = disease_stage),
        linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) + labs(y = "SNV MERs mutated (%)") +
    facet_grid(~disease_stage, space = "free") + theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 13), axis.text.x.bottom = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x.bottom = element_blank(), legend.position = "none", strip.background.y = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    strip.text.y = element_text(angle = 0, size = 14), strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 0,
        size = 14))
```

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment", x = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$final_midpoint -
        8, xend = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$final_midpoint + 8, y = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians$median_uniq_mers,
        yend = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians$median_uniq_mers, color = "hotpink",
        linewidth = 2.25) + ggplot2::annotate(geom = "segment", x = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$final_midpoint[2],
    xend = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$final_midpoint[3], y = max(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count$n) +
        7, yend = max(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count$n) + 7, linewidth = 0.33) +
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "text", x = midpoint(x = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$final_midpoint[2:3])[[1]][2],
        y = max(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count$n) + 9, label = paste0("P=",
            uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_wilcox_output$p_string[4]), size = 4.5) +
    ggplot2::annotate(geom = "rect", xmin = c(0, uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$group_range[-4]),
        xmax = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_medians_x$group_range, ymin = 0, ymax = max(uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count$n) +
            15, alpha = 0.3, fill = c("gray75", "gray35", "gray75", "gray35"))
```

Check the relationship between MER SNVs and total SNV burden

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# linear corr between total SNVs in MERs and unique MERs All together
uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx <- left_join(x = gr2dt(ncsnv_per_sample) %>%
    dplyr::rename(sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode), y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage), by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage, mer_id) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::count(mer_id)

uniq_indel_mers_per_sample_by_dx <- left_join(x = gr2dt(ncindel_per_sample) %>%
    dplyr::rename(sample = Tumor_Sample_Barcode), y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage), by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage, mer_id) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::count(mer_id)

uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count <- uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, mer_id) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
## Adding missing grouping variables: `disease_stage`

uniq_indel_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count <- uniq_indel_mers_per_sample_by_dx %>%
    dplyr::select(sample, mer_id) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(n)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
## Adding missing grouping variables: `disease_stage`

# Goal is to describe the number of unique MERs per sample as a function of the
# total SNV burden
mer_correlations <- left_join(x = fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::filter(mut_type == "SNVs") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup(), y = uniq_snv_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count, by = c("sample",
    "disease_stage")) %>%
    dplyr::rename(total_snv_burden = n.x, uniq_mers = n.y)

indel_mer_correlations <- left_join(x = fish_muts_hq %>%
    dplyr::filter(mut_type == "InDels") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample, disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::count() %>%
    dplyr::ungroup(), y = uniq_indel_mers_per_sample_by_dx_count, by = c("sample",
    "disease_stage")) %>%
    dplyr::rename(total_indel_burden = n.x, uniq_mers = n.y)

# convert mutations from raw total to per 1k
mer_correlations$total_snv_per_1k <- mer_correlations$total_snv_burden/1000

indel_mer_correlations$total_indel_per_1k <- indel_mer_correlations$total_indel_burden/1000

uniq_mer_total_burden_corr_plot <- ggplot(mer_correlations) + geom_point(aes(x = total_snv_per_1k,
    y = uniq_mers, fill = disease_stage), size = 3, shape = 21, color = "black") +
    geom_smooth(aes(x = total_snv_per_1k, y = uniq_mers), method = "lm", formula = y ~
        x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "#FB832D", alpha = 0.75) + ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = total_snv_per_1k,
    y = uniq_mers), label.x = 7, label.y = 10, size = 4.5) + ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = total_snv_per_1k,
    y = uniq_mers), label.x = 7, label.y = 5, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001) +
    labs(x = "SNV Burden (1 k)", y = "Unique SNV MERs") + scale_fill_manual(name = "Disease Stage",
    values = disease_stage_colors) + theme(legend.position = "top", legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent", linewidth = 1))

uniq_indel_mer_total_burden_corr_plot <- ggplot(indel_mer_correlations) + geom_point(aes(x = total_indel_burden,
    y = uniq_mers, fill = disease_stage), size = 3, shape = 21, color = "black",
    na.rm = T) + geom_smooth(aes(x = total_indel_burden, y = uniq_mers), method = "lm",
    formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "black", alpha = 0.75, na.rm = T) +
    ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(aes(x = total_indel_burden, y = uniq_mers), label.x = 550,
        label.y = 1, size = 4.5, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_cor(aes(x = total_indel_burden,
    y = uniq_mers), label.x = 550, label.y = 0.6, size = 4.5, p.accuracy = 0.0001,
    na.rm = T) + labs(x = "InDel Burden", y = "Unique InDel MERs") + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,
    7)) + scale_fill_manual(name = "Disease Stage", values = disease_stage_colors) +
    theme(legend.position = "top", legend.text = element_text(size = 13), panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent",
        linewidth = 1))
```

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
    100), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 9), expand = c(0.03,
    0.03), labels = scales::label_comma(accuracy = 1)) + scale_fill_manual(name = "Disease Stage",
    values = disease_stage_colors) + facet_wrap(facets = ~disease_stage) + theme(legend.position = "top",
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))
```

## SBS signatures at MERs have features of punctuated lineage-specific mutagenesis from endogenous mechanisms and off-target AID, Part 1

Complete SBS profile across all samples

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .code-overflow-wrap  code-fold="true"}
# WITH SBSBLOOD AND WITHOUT SBS5

# For proper SBS signatures to be called, we must have sufficient number of
# SNVs Typical minimum cutoff is 1000 SNVs (2000 is default for
# SigProfilerTopography) First, collect all SNVs across all MERs
hq_dataset_sigs <- fish_muts_hq[VARIANT_CLASS == "SNV", .(sample, seqnames, start,
    Reference_Allele, Tumor_Seq_Allele2)] %>%
    dplyr::filter(sample %in% tmb_fish_eligbile$sample)

# Now prepare the data for mmsig Correct the column names for input to mmsig
colnames(hq_dataset_sigs) <- c("sample", "chr", "pos", "ref", "alt")

# Prep the input for mmsig using deconstructSig
hq_dataset_sig_96 <- deconstructSigs::mut.to.sigs.input(mut.ref = hq_dataset_sigs,
    sample.id = "sample", chr = "chr", pos = "pos", ref = "ref", alt = "alt", bsg = BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
# Generate a 96 class SBS profile
hq_dataset_sig_96_p <- plot_sbs96(hq_dataset_sig_96) + labs(title = "High-qualty genomic regions")

# Translate data for use in mmsig
hq_dataset_sig_96$Total <- rowSums(hq_dataset_sig_96)
hq_dataset_sig_96_transpose <- as.data.frame.matrix(t(hq_dataset_sig_96))

# Prep the signature reference for the fitted approach
data(signature_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38)

# SBS1 & SBS5 for clock-like (priority to use SBS5 for all rather than split
# into SBS5 / SBS40) SBS2 & SBS13 for APOBEC SBS8 still unknown SBS9 for Pol
# Eta somatic hyper mutation SBS18 for Damage by reactive oxygen species (ROS)
# SBS84 & SBS85 for canonical AID (excluded in analysis) SBS99 for melphalan
# exposure (included from previous analysis as known signature) SBS45, SBS46,
# and SBS49 for sequencing artifacts (used to identify possilbe exclusion of
# samples, if not excluded via de novo extraction) Add SBSblood as more
# appropriate description of SBS5
sbs_blood <- fread(file = paste0(base_data_path, "sbsBloodRefSig.txt"), sep = "\t",
    header = T)

sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38 <- signature_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38 %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c("sub", "tri", "SBS1", "SBS2", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS13",
        "SBS18", "SBS84", "SBS-MM1"))) %>%
    dplyr::rename(SBS99 = `SBS-MM1`) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = sbs_blood, by = c("sub", "tri"))

# Fit the signatures Complete set of all MER mutations Break them up in to
# smaller groups to see if this works chunk 1
hq_dataset_sig_96_out <- mm_fit_signatures(muts.input = hq_dataset_sig_96_transpose,
    sig.input = sig_ref_cosmic_v3_2_hg38, input.format = "classes", sample.sigt.profs = NULL,
    strandbias = FALSE, bootstrap = FALSE, genome = "hg38", dbg = FALSE)


# SBS1, SBSblood, SBS8, SBS9, SBS84, SBS18, SBS99, SBS2, SBS13
mmsig_signames_updated <- c("SBS1", "SBSblood", "SBS8", "SBS9", "SBS84", "SBS18",
    "SBS99", "SBS2", "SBS13")
mmsig_colors <- c("#1B9E77FF", "#7570B3FF", "#E7298AFF", "#66A61EFF", "#FB8072",
    "#A6761DFF", "#666666FF", "#D95F02FF", "#E6AB02FF")

hq_dataset_sigs_t <- reshape2::melt(data = hq_dataset_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage) %>%
        droplevels(), by = "sample") %>%
    as.data.table(), id.vars = c("sample", "disease_stage"), variable.name = "signature",
    value.name = "rel_contrib")

hq_dataset_sigs_order <- hq_dataset_sig_96_out$estimate %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::select(-mutations) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(sample, disease_stage) %>%
        droplevels(), by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(sum_aid = SBS9 + SBS84) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(sum_aid) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(disease_stage) %>%
    dplyr::select(sample)

hq_dataset_sigs_t$sample <- factor(hq_dataset_sigs_t$sample, levels = hq_dataset_sigs_order$sample)

hq_dataset_sigs_t$signature <- factor(hq_dataset_sigs_t$signature, levels = mmsig_signames_updated)


hq_dataset_mmsig_bar_p <- ggplot(hq_dataset_sigs_t, aes(x = sample, y = rel_contrib,
    fill = signature)) + geom_col(width = 1) + scale_fill_manual(name = "Signature",
    values = mmsig_colors) + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + labs(x = "Samples",
    y = "Relative Contribution") + theme(legend.position = "right", axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(fill = "transparent"))


######## RELATIONSHIPS OF SBS AND METADATA ###########


# SBS1, SBSblood, and the combined SBS1 Relative
sbs1_rel_vs_age <- hq_dataset_sigs_t %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
        dplyr::select(sample, age), by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::filter(signature == "SBS1") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = age, y = rel_contrib)) + geom_point(aes(color = disease_stage)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, linewidth = 1.5, color = "darkred",
        alpha = 0.75, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(label.x = 55, label.y = 0.17,
    size = 4.5, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_cor(label.x = 55, label.y = 0.15, size = 4.5,
    na.rm = T, p.accuracy = 0.0001) + labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "SBS1 Contribution (%)") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(25, 90), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03,
    0.03), labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)) + scale_color_manual(name = "Disease Stage",
    values = disease_stage_colors)

# SBS1 Absolute
sbs1_abs_vs_age <- hq_dataset_sigs_t %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%

    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_sig_96_out$estimate %>%

    dplyr::mutate(abs_burden = round(rel_contrib * mutations, digits = 0)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = age, y = abs_burden)) + geom_point(aes(color = disease_stage)) +

        alpha = 0.75, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(label.x = 55, label.y = 600,
    size = 4.5, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_cor(label.x = 55, label.y = 570, size = 4.5,

    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(25, 90), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) + scale_color_manual(name = "Disease Stage",
    values = disease_stage_colors)

####### SBSblood Relative
sbsblood_rel_vs_age <- hq_dataset_sigs_t %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%

    dplyr::filter(signature == "SBSblood") %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = age, y = rel_contrib)) + geom_point(aes(color = disease_stage)) +

        alpha = 0.75, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_regline_equation(label.x = 55, label.y = 0.17,
    size = 4.5, na.rm = T) + ggpubr::stat_cor(label.x = 55, label.y = 0.15, size = 4.5,
    na.rm = T, p.accuracy = 0.0001) + labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "SBSblood Contribution (%)") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(25, 90), expand = c(0.03, 0.03)) + scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03,
    0.03), labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)) + scale_color_manual(name = "Disease Stage",
    values = disease_stage_colors)

# SBSblood absolute
sbsblood_abs_vs_age <- hq_dataset_sigs_t %>%
    dplyr::left_join(y = hq_dataset_metadata %>%
```
